item.title: 小米 YU7 GT、小米 17 Max 正式发布，雷军：强烈建议现在就换手机
item.guid: 小米-YU7-GT、小米-17-Max-正式发布，雷军：强烈建议现在就换手机
item.description:
Xiaomi held a new product launch event for its human-car-home full ecosystem last night , officially releasing the Xiaomi YU7 GT, YU7 Standard Edition, Xiaomi 17 Max, and several wearable and IoT new products. 小米昨晚举行人车家全生态新品发布会 ，正式发布小米 YU7 GT、YU7 标准版、小米 17 Max 和多款可穿戴、IoT 新品。

Xiaomi YU7 GT: 小米 YU7 GT：

    Priced from 389,900 yuan, the "GT Fully Loaded" version is 429,900 yuan;

    Equipped with V6s Plus + V8s EVO dual-motor system, maximum horsepower 1003PS, top speed 300km/h, 0-100km/h acceleration in 2.92s;

    Adopts the same track-spec braking system as the SU7 Ultra, equipped with carbon-ceramic brake discs and Akebono front six-piston, rear four-piston high-performance calipers;

    Utilizes an 897V silicon carbide high-voltage platform, with a maximum charging rate of 5.2C, and a CLTC range of 705km.

Lei Jun stated at the press conference that the YU7 GT set a new Nürburgring SUV lap record of 7 minutes 22.755 seconds, 14 seconds faster than the previous record; Xiaomi also released a comparison of its cornering speed with the Cayenne Turbo GT, with a result of 32 wins, 17 losses, and 1 draw. 雷军在发布会上称，YU7 GT 以 7 分 22 秒 755 刷新纽北 SUV 圈速纪录，较此前纪录快 14 秒；小米还公布了它与 Cayenne Turbo GT 的弯心速度对比，结果为 32 胜 17 负 1 平。

Lei Jun also compared the sales data of YU7 with Tesla Model Y at the press conference, stating that in the past 10 months, YU7's sales exceeded Model Y's in two months, and commented that "losing to the global sales champion is not shameful." 雷军还在发布会现场对比了 YU7 与特斯拉 Model Y 的销售数据，称在过去 10 个月中，YU7 有两个月的销量超过 Model Y，并表示「输给全球销冠不丢人」。

🔗 Related Reading: First Look | Xiaomi YU7 GT Review: The Fastest SUV on the Nürburgring, How Fast Is It? 🔗 相关阅读： 首发｜小米 YU7 GT 评测：纽北最速 SUV，到底有多快？

Xiaomi 17 Max positioned as a large-screen standard flagship: 小米 17 Max 定位大屏标准版旗舰：

    12GB + 256GB priced at 4799 yuan, top-end 16GB + 512GB priced at 5799 yuan

    Equipped with the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme Edition, featuring a 6.9-inch ultra-large flat screen with a peak brightness of 3500nits;

    Built-in 8000mAh Jinshajiang battery, supporting 100W wired and 50W wireless charging;

    Body width 77.6mm, thickness 8.2mm, weight 225g;

    Imaging features a Leica 200-megapixel main camera with a 1/1.4-inch sensor, and is equipped with a Leica large-sensor periscope telephoto lens.

When Lei Jun announced the prices at the press conference, he mentioned that given the current surge in memory prices, Xiaomi's pricing is still very good value. He emphasized that, according to their predictions, memory prices will continue to rise in the next two years, and phone prices will inevitably follow suit, making phones potentially more expensive. 雷军在发布会上公布价格时提到，在内存暴涨的当下，小米给出的定价还是非常超值的。他强调，未来两年，据我们的预测，内存还会持续上涨，手机的售价不得不跟着上涨，手机可能会越来越贵。

If you plan to replace your phone in the next year, I strongly recommend you do it now.

Other new products include: 其他新品包括：

    The YU7 Standard Edition returns, priced at 233,500 yuan, with a CLTC range of 643km, equipped with lidar, 4D millimeter-wave radar, and 700TOPS assisted driving computing power;

    Xiaomi's first ear-clip headphones are priced at 799 yuan for the initial sale, supporting smart translation for 21 languages, independent recording, and Apple Find My;

    Xiaomi Band 10 Pro starts at 399 yuan for its first sale, featuring a 1.74-inch screen, dual light group dual PD sensors, sleep HRV, 150+ sports modes, and up to 21 days of battery life;

    In terms of IoT and automotive peripherals, Xiaomi also released products such as the Mijia Powerful Wind Pro vertical air conditioner, central air conditioner powerful wind duct machine, MiCare warranty service for large appliances, 20kW DC home charging pile, and car table board.

item.title: OpenAI 最快本周递交 IPO 招股书，抢占「第一股」
item.guid: OpenAI-最快本周递交-IPO-招股书，抢占「第一股」
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, OpenAI plans to confidentially file a draft IPO prospectus with the SEC as early as this Friday, aiming for an official listing in September this year. Meanwhile, SpaceX submitted new listing documents yesterday, and Anthropic disclosed better-than-expected profit prospects to investors, with three AI star companies collectively moving towards the public market on the same day. 据《华尔街日报》报道，OpenAI 计划最快于本周五向 SEC 秘密递交 IPO 招股书草案，目标今年 9 月正式上市。与此同时，SpaceX 昨日提交新的上市文件，Anthropic 向投资者披露超预期盈利前景，三家 AI 明星公司在同一天集体向公开市场迈进。

In terms of competitive pressure, Anthropic's threat should not be underestimated. It expects to achieve its first quarterly operating profit in the quarter ending June this year, and according to Ramp's AI Index report, the proportion of enterprise paying customers reached 34.4% in April this year, surpassing OpenAI's 32.3% for the first time. 在竞争压力上，Anthropic 的威胁不容小觑。其预计今年 6 月结束的季度将实现首个季度经营盈利，且据 Ramp 的 AI 指数报告，今年 4 月企业付费客户占比已达 34.4%，首次超越 OpenAI 的 32.3%。

Internally, OpenAI has disagreements on the IPO timeline: CEO Altman is pushing for a September listing, while CFO Frial is cautious. Founding member Karpathy announced yesterday that he joined Anthropic, and the talent drain issue continues. 内部方面，OpenAI 在上市时间表上存在分歧：CEO 奥尔特曼力推 9 月上市，CFO 弗里亚尔则态度审慎。创始成员卡帕西昨日宣布加入 Anthropic，人才流失问题持续。

item.title: 前 Jane Street 工程师加盟 DeepSeek，推进 coding agent
item.guid: 前-Jane-Street-工程师加盟-DeepSeek，推进-coding-agent
item.description:
LinkedIn shows that Cui Tianyi, former co-founder of TSY Capital, joined DeepSeek in March this year. Cui Tianyi worked at Jane Street for 9 years and co-founded TSY Capital, a Hong Kong quantitative trading firm, in 2022. 领英页面显示，前 TSY Capital 联合创始人崔添翼已于今年 3 月加入 DeepSeek。崔添翼曾在 Jane Street 工作 9 年，2022 年共同创办香港量化交易机构 TSY Capital。

According to the South China Morning Post, after joining, Cui Tianyi will participate in AI harness-related work, which involves packaging underlying models into agent product infrastructure that can execute tasks, call tools, and work continuously. 据《南华早报》报道，崔添翼加入后将参与 AI harness 相关工作，也就是把底层模型包装成可执行任务、调用工具、持续工作的 agent 产品基础设施。

item.title: 努比亚总裁回应豆包预定餐厅乌龙：豆包手机真的可以
item.guid: 努比亚总裁回应豆包预定餐厅乌龙：豆包手机真的可以
item.description:
Yesterday, Ni Fei, President of ZTE Terminal Business Unit and President of Nubia Technology Co., Ltd., released a video responding to the recent "Doubao AI restaurant reservation blunder" incident. 昨天，中兴通讯终端事业部总裁、努比亚技术有限公司总裁倪飞发布视频，回应近日「豆包 AI 预约餐厅乌龙」事件。

The incident originated from a netizen's previous sharing of an experience using Doubao AI to book a restaurant: the AI gave a virtual response in the conversation, which the user believed to be true and went to the restaurant, only to be rejected. 事件起因于此前有网民分享使用豆包 AI 预订餐厅的经历：AI 在对话中给出了虚拟回复，用户信以为真前往餐厅，最终遭到拒绝。

Ni Fei stated in the video that although the Doubao APP may not currently support actual reservation functions, the Nubia M153, equipped with the Doubao mobile assistant, can perform such operations. He demonstrated live in the video: directly issuing voice commands to the phone, requesting to filter nearby restaurants, book for 6 PM the next evening, for a 5-person dinner. 倪飞在视频中表示，虽然豆包 APP 目前可能尚不支持实际预约功能，但搭载豆包手机助手的努比亚 M153 可以执行此类操作。他在视频中现场演示：直接向手机发出语音指令，要求筛选附近餐厅、预约次日傍晚 6 点、5 人聚餐。

Doubao then selected a restaurant based on its previous dining preferences, confirmed the time and number of people, and completed the reservation. Ni Fei concluded the video by saying, "I believe it won't be long before everyone feels that using Doubao to book a restaurant is just a common thing in daily life." 豆包随后根据其此前的饮食偏好选定餐厅、确认时间与人数，并完成预约。倪飞在视频结尾称，「相信过不了多久，大家就会觉得，用豆包预约餐厅只是生活中习以为常的一件事了。」

item.title: 特斯拉监督版 FSD 将入华
item.guid: 特斯拉监督版-FSD-将入华
item.description:
This morning, Tesla officially tweeted the latest deployment progress of supervised FSD, mentioning that supervised FSD can be used in China. 今早，特斯拉官方发推公布了监督版 FSD 的最新布局进度，其中提到监督版 FSD 可以在中国使用。

According to multiple reports, supervised FSD in Europe currently only supports a subscription model, and the one-time purchase option will be completely canceled globally in February 2026. Lithuanian car owners pay a monthly subscription fee of 99 euros; if they have previously purchased Enhanced Autopilot, the monthly fee can be as low as 49 euros. 据多家报道，欧洲地区的监督版 FSD 目前仅支持订阅制，一次性买断方案已于 2026 年 2 月在全球范围内全面取消。立陶宛车主每月订阅费用为 99 欧元；若此前已购买增强版 Autopilot，月费可低至 49 欧元。

Tesla stated that as the system gradually iterates and upgrades to unsupervised autonomous driving, subscription prices will be adjusted upwards later. 特斯拉表示，随着该系统逐步向无监督自动驾驶迭代升级，订阅价格后续还会上调。

According to IT Home, Tesla's recent recruitment page shows that it is hiring intelligent driving test (real vehicle test) technicians in 9 cities: Beijing, Shanghai, Tianjin, Chongqing, Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Chengdu, Suzhou, and Wuhan. 据 IT 之家报道，近期特斯拉招聘页面显示，其在北京、上海、天津、重庆、广州、深圳、成都、苏州、武汉 9 座城市招聘智驾测试（实车测试）技师。

This recruitment position belongs to the R&D - Autopilot department, indicating that flexible travel to various locations domestically and internationally may be required for on-site vehicle testing on public roads, test tracks, and validation grounds. 该招聘职位属于研发-自动驾驶 Autopilot 部门，显示可能需要灵活出差至国内外各地，在公共道路、测试跑道和验证场地对车辆进行实地测试。

Additionally, in April this year, Tesla posted that it is working hard to launch intelligent assisted driving in the Chinese market as soon as possible. 另外，今年 4 月，特斯拉发文表示，正努力早日在中国市场推出智能辅助驾驶。

item.title: Antigravity 永久上调三倍 Gemini 限额
item.guid: Antigravity-永久上调三倍-Gemini-限额
item.description:
Varun Mohan, a core member of the Antigravity team, announced yesterday that in response to community feedback on rate limit issues, the platform will permanently increase the rate limit for all paid-tier Gemini models by 3 times and immediately reset all users' weekly quota. Antigravity 团队核心成员 Varun Mohan 昨日宣布，针对社区反馈的速率限制问题，平台将永久提升所有付费层级 Gemini 模型的速率限制 3 倍，并即时重置了所有用户的本周额度配额。

Mohan explicitly stated in a subsequent reply that this 3x increase is a permanent adjustment, not a temporary measure. Mohan 在随后的回复中明确表示，此次 3 倍提升为永久性调整，并非临时措施。

Previously, multiple developers reported on social media that after Antigravity 2.0 went live, the rate limits for Gemini models were significantly tightened, with some users exhausting their weekly quota within approximately 2 hours. 此前，多名开发者在社交媒体上反映，Antigravity 2.0 上线后 Gemini 模型的速率限制明显收紧，部分用户在约 2 小时内便耗尽了本周配额。

item.title: 剪映海外版 CapCut 宣布接入 Gemini，聊天就能剪视频
item.guid: 剪映海外版-CapCut-宣布接入-Gemini，聊天就能剪视频
item.description:
CapCut, the overseas version of Jianying, announced yesterday on X that it will partner with Google Gemini, allowing users to directly access CapCut's video and image editing features within the Gemini app in the future, without switching to a separate application. 剪映海外版 CapCut 昨日在 X 宣布，将与 Google Gemini 达成合作，用户未来可直接在 Gemini 应用内调用 CapCut 的视频与图像编辑功能，无需切换至独立应用。

According to the introduction, after the cooperation is implemented, users will be able to use CapCut's creative editing capabilities within the Gemini chat interface to complete image and video processing, achieving a seamless end-to-end process from creative conception to content production. 据介绍，合作落地后，用户将能够在 Gemini 对话界面中使用 CapCut 的创意编辑能力完成图像和视频处理，实现从创意构思到内容产出的全流程贯通。

item.title: 宝马集团任命方媛出任宝马中国企业事务副总裁
item.guid: 宝马集团任命方媛出任宝马中国企业事务副总裁
item.description:
According to Sina Auto, BMW Group announced today the appointment of Fang Yuan as Vice President of Corporate Affairs for BMW China, concurrently serving as Vice President of Public Relations and Corporate Social Responsibility for BMW Brilliance. This appointment will officially take effect on June 1, 2026. 据新浪汽车消息，宝马集团今日宣布，任命方媛为宝马中国企业事务副总裁，兼任华晨宝马公共关系及企业社会责任副总裁。该任命自 2026 年 6 月 1 日起正式生效。

It is reported that Fang Yuan has over 25 years of experience in public relations and communications, with a long-standing focus on the automotive industry. Since joining BMW Brilliance Automotive Ltd. in 2012, she has held various management positions in areas such as product and technology communications, media relations, social media communications, and crisis management. 据悉，方媛拥有超过 25 年的公共关系与传播领域经验，并长期深耕汽车行业。自 2012 年加入华晨宝马汽车有限公司以来，她先后在产品与技术传播、媒体关系，社交媒体传播及危机管理等领域担任多个管理职位。

The report also pointed out that her rich experience accumulated in various business areas, deep understanding of the company, and strong sense of responsibility will provide a solid foundation for her to fulfill her new duties. 报道还指出，其在不同业务领域积累的丰富经验、对企业的深刻理解以及高度的责任感，将为其履行新职责提供坚实基础。

item.title: 昔日互联网招聘「独角兽」拉勾网进入破产程序
item.guid: 昔日互联网招聘「独角兽」拉勾网进入破产程序
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Beijing Lagou Network Technology Co., Ltd., the operating entity of the internet vertical recruitment platform Lagou.com, has entered bankruptcy reorganization proceedings. 据界面新闻报道，互联网垂直招聘平台拉勾网的运营主体北京拉勾网络技术有限公司已进入破产重整程序。

This time, the company itself filed for bankruptcy. Jiemian News visited Lagou's official website and found that the site is still accessible, but user comments on many recruitment pages are six months old, the 400 customer service hotline is unanswered, official Weibo and WeChat accounts have stopped updating since March 2025, and the app has been removed from the Apple App Store. 此次是公司自行申请破产。界面新闻访问拉勾官网发现，网站仍可打开，但大量招聘页面用户评论停留在半年前，400 客服电话无人接听，官方微博和微信公众号自 2025 年 3 月起停止更新，App 也已从苹果 App Store 下架。

Lagou.com was founded in 2013, focusing on recruitment for internet companies and professionals. Eight months after its launch, the platform completed a $5 million Series A funding round, followed by a $25 million Series B round in 2014, with its valuation once rising to $150 million; in 2017, 51job made a strategic investment of $120 million and acquired a 60% stake. 拉勾网成立于 2013 年，曾专注互联网企业和互联网从业者招聘。平台上线八个月后完成 500 万美元 A 轮融资，2014 年完成 2500 万美元 B 轮融资，估值一度升至 1.5 亿美元；2017 年前程无忧以 1.2 亿美元战略投资并取得 60% 股权。

item.title: 网易一季度净收入 306 亿元，游戏业务收入 257 亿元
item.guid: 网易一季度净收入-306-亿元，游戏业务收入-257-亿元
item.description:
NetEase released its Q1 2026 financial report yesterday, achieving net revenue of 30.6 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6.1%, and a quarter-on-quarter increase from the previous quarter's 27.5 billion yuan; gross profit was 21.2 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 14.8%; net profit attributable to shareholders for the first quarter was 10.7 billion yuan. 网易昨日发布 2026 年第一季度财报，期内实现净收入 306 亿元，同比增长 6.1%，环比上一季度的 275 亿元增长；毛利 212 亿元，同比增长 14.8%；一季度归属于公司股东的净利润为 107 亿元。

    Net revenue from games and related value-added services was 25.7 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6.9%, with online game operating revenue accounting for approximately 97.5% of this segment's net revenue;

    NetEase Youdao's net revenue was 1.3 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 3.8%, but a quarter-on-quarter decrease, mainly due to reduced revenue from learning services and smart hardware;

    NetEase Cloud Music's net revenue was 2 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 6.6%;

    Net revenue from innovative and other businesses was 1.5 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 4.6%, with the quarter-on-quarter decrease mainly due to reduced revenue from e-commerce and advertising businesses.

Games remained the main focus of this quarter's financial report. NetEase stated that existing games such as the "Fantasy Westward Journey" series, "Identity V," "Eggy Party," "Justice Mobile," and "Where Winds Meet" maintained their activity and revenue performance, while products like "Where Winds Meet" and "Marvel Rivals" are also advancing globalization. 游戏仍是本季财报主轴。网易称，《梦幻西游》系列、《第五人格》、《蛋仔派对》、《逆水寒》手游和《燕云十六声》等既有游戏保持活跃度和收入表现，《燕云十六声》和《漫威争锋》等产品也推进全球化。

item.title: 联想 2025/26 财年营收 5899 亿元，全年 AI 收入同比翻番
item.guid: 联想-2025/26-财年营收-5899-亿元，全年-AI-收入同比翻番
item.description:
Lenovo Group today released its Q4 and full-year results for fiscal year 2025/26. Full-year revenue was 589.9 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 20.3%; adjusted net profit increased by 42.1% year-on-year, reaching a record high. According to HKFRS, Q4 net profit was nearly six times that of the same period last year. 联想集团今天发布 2025/26 财年第四季度及全年业绩。全年营收 5899 亿元人民币，同比增长 20.3%；经调整净利润同比增长 42.1%，创历史新高。按 HKFRS 口径，第四财季净利润为去年同期近六倍。

    Q4 revenue was nearly 150 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 27.1%, marking the highest growth rate in nearly 20 quarters;

    IDG (Intelligent Devices Group) Q4 revenue was 101.2 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 24%; full-year PC market share was 24.2%, reaching a record high;

    ISG (Infrastructure Solutions Group) Q4 revenue was 39 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 37%, returning to profitability as scheduled, and operating profit margin set a new historical record; full-year revenue exceeded 136 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 32%, achieving full-year profitability;

    SSG (Solutions and Services Group) Q4 revenue was 17.75 billion yuan, achieving double-digit growth for the 20th consecutive quarter, with an operating profit margin of 22.4%

    Full-year AI-related revenue increased by 105% year-on-year; Q4 AI revenue proportion rose to 38%.

The most significant structural change this fiscal year is ISG's turnaround, with full-year AI server revenue growing by 50% year-on-year, forming an order reserve of over 140 billion RMB. Lenovo completed the acquisition of storage company Infinidat in April, further strengthening its enterprise-grade storage capabilities. 本财年最显著的结构性变化在于 ISG 完成扭亏，全年 AI 服务器收入同比增长 50%，形成超过 1400 亿元人民币订单储备。联想 4 月完成对存储企业 Infinidat 的收购，进一步补强企业级存储能力。

CEO Yang Yuanqing stated that the company is confident in its goal of becoming a hundred-billion-dollar enterprise within the next two years. CEO 杨元庆表示，公司对未来两年内跃升为千亿美元规模企业的目标充满信心。

item.title: 💡 Cloudflare 裁掉 20% 员工，CEO：这将成为未来一年企业界的普遍现象
item.guid: 💡-Cloudflare-裁掉-20%-员工，CEO：这将成为未来一年企业界的普遍现象
item.description:
According to The Wall Street Journal, Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince published an op-ed yesterday, revealing the decision-making logic behind the company's layoffs of over 20%. 据《华尔街日报》报道，Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince 昨日发表评论文章，披露了该公司裁员逾 20% 背后的决策逻辑。

He stated that the layoffs were not due to company operational difficulties, characterizing them as proactive business structural adjustments, and cited management guru Peter Drucker's 1954 book "The Practice of Management" as an analytical framework. 他表示，此次裁员并非因公司经营困难，将裁员定性为主动的业务结构调整，并援引管理学家彼得 · 德鲁克 1954 年的著作《管理的实践》作为分析框架。

Prince categorized internal company roles into three types: "builders" responsible for product development, "sellers" responsible for market expansion, and "measurers" covering functions such as internal audit, finance, legal, compliance, middle management, and operations. Prince 将企业内部岗位分为三类：「建造者」负责开发产品，「销售者」负责开拓市场，「测量者」则涵盖内部审计、财务、法务、合规、中层管理、运营等职能。

He believes that builders and sellers will not be replaced by AI —increased engineer productivity means the company will hire more engineers, and sales roles rely on interpersonal trust, making them equally difficult to replace. "Measurers" are different; AI can continuously perform such work at a lower cost and with higher accuracy. 他认为，建造者和销售者不会被 AI 取代 ——工程师生产效率提升意味着公司将招募更多工程师，而销售岗位依赖人际信任，同样难以被替代。「测量者」则不同，AI 可以以更低成本、更高精度持续完成此类工作。

Based on this judgment, Cloudflare's layoffs primarily targeted the "measurer" group: middle management positions were significantly cut, operational functions were integrated into a unified team, and marketing and finance departments both saw reductions. 基于这一判断，Cloudflare 此次裁员的主要对象正是测量者群体：中层管理岗位被大幅削减，运营职能整合为统一团队，市场营销和财务部门均有所收缩。

Prince concluded the article by stating that AI will not eliminate all jobs, but it will change how every enterprise operates—the ultimate result is for humans to focus more on two things: creating value and capturing value, i.e., building and selling. Prince 在文章结尾表示，AI 不会消灭所有工作，但会改变每一家企业的运营方式——最终结果是让人类更专注于创造价值和捕获价值的两件事：建造和销售。

item.title: 2499 元，OPPO Find X9 Ultra 哈苏影像套装「极地冰川」配色开售
item.guid: 2499-元，OPPO-Find-X9-Ultra-哈苏影像套装「极地冰川」配色开售
item.description:
OPPO announced yesterday that the OPPO Find X9 Ultra Hasselblad Professional Imaging Accessory Kit in "Polar Glacier" color is officially on sale, priced at 2499 yuan; the "Earth Tundra" color will go on sale on May 31. OPPO 昨日宣布，OPPO Find X9 Ultra 哈苏专业影像配件套装「极地冰川」配色正式开售，定价 2499 元；「大地苔原」配色将在 5 月 31 日开售。

The kit includes an OPPO teleconverter handgrip bracket, professional teleconverter adapter ring and filter adapter ring, custom professional photography shoulder strap, dedicated teleconverter lens hood, teleconverter storage bag, OPPO Hasselblad custom front and rear lens caps, and lens decorative ring. 套装内包含 OPPO 增距镜手托支架、专业增距镜转接环与滤镜转接环、定制专业摄影肩带、增距镜专用遮光罩、增距镜收纳包、OPPO 哈苏定制前后镜头盖和镜头装饰环。

item.title: ThinkPad X13 Gen 7 海外规格公布
item.guid: ThinkPad-X13-Gen-7-海外规格公布
item.description:
Lenovo has announced the specifications for the ThinkPad X13 Gen 7 laptop in overseas markets. The new machine offers options for AMD Gorgon Point and Intel Panther Lake platforms, with a body weight of approximately 930 grams. 联想已在海外市场公布 ThinkPad X13 Gen 7 笔记本规格，新机可选 AMD Gorgon Point 与英特尔 Panther Lake 平台，机身重量约 930 克。

    The entry-level Intel version comes with Core Ultra 5 325, upgradable to Core Ultra 7 356H; the AMD version starts with Ryzen AI 5 Pro 440, upgradable to Ryzen AI 7 Pro 450;

    Both Intel/AMD versions support 16GB or 32GB LPDDR5X-8533 memory, with SSDs up to 1TB; the AMD version offers optional PCIe 5.0 SSD, while the Intel version supports PCIe 4.0 SSD;

    13-inch 1920 × 1200 IPS screen, maximum brightness 400 nits, 60Hz refresh rate; offers two battery options: 41Wh and 54.7Wh;

    1 USB-A 5Gbps, 2 Thunderbolt 4, 1 HDMI, 3.5mm jack, and Kensington lock slot, with optional smart card reader.

Regarding pricing, the Intel version starts at 2429 AUD in the Australian market, equivalent to approximately 11794 RMB; the AMD version starts at 2220 AUD, equivalent to approximately 10779 RMB. 价格方面，英特尔版在澳大利亚市场起售价为 2429 澳元，约合 11794 元人民币；AMD 版起售价为 2220 澳元，约合 10779 元人民币。

item.title: Photoshop 27.7 加入本地 AI 消除模型
item.guid: Photoshop-27.7-加入本地-AI-消除模型
item.description:
According to 9to5Mac, Adobe yesterday released Photoshop 27.7, which adds a local AI model to the "Remove" tool, allowing object removal to be completed on-device without uploading edited content to the cloud for processing. 据 9to5Mac 报道，Adobe 昨日发布 Photoshop 27.7，其中「移除」工具新增本地 AI 模型，可在设备端完成物体移除，不必把编辑内容上传到云端处理。

After this feature goes live, users can process edits locally after downloading the model, or cancel/remove the model and switch between cloud and on-device processing. Adobe's help documentation indicates that Photoshop automatically checks hardware compatibility. Local AI removal models have hardware requirements: 这项功能上线后，用户可以在下载模型后本地处理编辑，也可以取消、移除模型，并在云端和设备端处理之间切换。Adobe 帮助文档显示，Photoshop 会自动检查硬件兼容性。本地 AI 移除模型存在硬件门槛：

    Mac: M1 Pro ARM or equivalent Intel CPU, 8 cores, medium discrete graphics card, ≥8 GB VRAM, 16 GB RAM, macOS 14 or later;

    Windows: 8 cores, Intel Rocket Lake or equivalent CPU, discrete graphics card such as NVidia RTX 3060+, ≥8 GB VRAM, 16 GB RAM;

item.title: 支持 33 种语言，腾讯混元 Hy-MT2 翻译模型开源
item.guid: 支持-33-种语言，腾讯混元-Hy-MT2-翻译模型开源
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan officially open-sourced the Hy-MT2 series of multilingual translation large models yesterday, including three versions: 1.8B, 7B, and 30B-A3B (MoE architecture). It supports 33 languages and 5 ethnic minority languages/dialects for mutual translation. Weights and code are now available on Hugging Face, ModelScope, and GitHub. 腾讯混元昨日正式开源 Hy-MT2 系列多语种翻译大模型，包含 1.8B、7B 及 30B-A3B（MoE 架构）三个版本，支持 33 种语言及 5 种民汉语言/方言互译，权重与代码已在 Hugging Face、ModelScope 及 GitHub 上线。

  • The 1.8B version, after 1.25-bit ultra-low precision quantization, has a volume of only about 440MB, enabling local offline inference on mobile chips from Apple, Qualcomm, MediaTek, etc., with inference speed increased by 1.5 times compared to the previous generation; 1.8B 版本经 1.25-bit 极低精度量化后体积仅约 440MB，可在苹果、高通、联发科等手机芯片上本地离线推理，推理速度较前代提升 1.5 倍；
  • The 7B and 30B-A3B versions scored 96.9% and 98.1% of Gemini 3.1 Pro's performance on FLORES-200, respectively, surpassing open-source models of the same scale like DeepSeek-V4-Pro; 7B 与 30B-A3B 版本在 FLORES-200 上得分分别达到 Gemini 3.1 Pro 的 96.9% 和 98.1%，并超越 DeepSeek-V4-Pro 等同量级开源模型；
  • In real-world business scenario tests, 30B-A3B's GEMBA score exceeded Gemini 3.1 Pro, and its performance partially leads mainstream translation models in vertical domains such as finance, politics, and education. 30B-A3B 在真实业务场景测试中 GEMBA 评分超过 Gemini 3.1 Pro，在金融、政治、教育等垂直领域表现部分领先主流翻译模型。

The "Tencent Hy Translation" WeChat mini-program, based on Hy-MT2, has been launched simultaneously, supporting voice input, custom translation styles, and offline inference. 基于 Hy-MT2 的「腾讯Hy翻译」微信小程序同步上线，支持语音输入、自定义翻译风格及离线推理。

item.title: xAI 悄然推出 grok-build-0.1，主打智能体编程场景
item.guid: xAI-悄然推出-grok-build-0.1，主打智能体编程场景
item.description:
xAI recently launched the model page for grok-build-0.1 in its official developer documentation, positioning it as a fast code model specifically trained for Agentic Coding, currently in early access. xAI 近日在官方开发者文档中上线了 grok-build-0.1 的模型页面，将其定位为专为智能体编程（Agentic Coding）训练的快速代码模型，目前处于早期访问阶段。

The official documentation shows that grok-build-0.1 supports text and image multimodal input, has a context window of 256k Tokens, and natively possesses tool calling, structured output, and reasoning capabilities. 官方文档显示， grok-build-0.1 支持文本与图像多模态输入，上下文窗口为 256k Token，原生具备工具调用、结构化输出与推理思考能力。

Regarding pricing, the base price for input tokens is $1/1M Token. After enabling prompt caching, the price for cached hits drops to $0.20/1M Token, and the output token price is $2/1M Token. 定价方面，输入 Token 基础价格为 1 美元/1M Token，开启提示词缓存后命中部分降至 0.20 美元/1M Token，输出 Token 价格为 2 美元/1M Token。

item.title: 智谱公布 ZCube 推理集群组网架构
item.guid: 智谱公布-ZCube-推理集群组网架构
item.description:
Zhipu announced its new inference cluster networking architecture, ZCube, yesterday, stating that it has been validated in a production environment and addresses structural network congestion issues in large model PD (Prefill-Decode) separated deployment. 智谱昨日公布新型推理集群组网架构 ZCube，称其已在生产环境完成验证，面向大模型 PD（Prefill-Decode）分离部署中的结构性网络拥塞问题。

  • Cluster inference throughput increased by 15%; 集群推理吞吐提升 15%；
  • First Token Response Tail Latency (TTFT P99) decreased by 40.6%; 首 Token 响应尾延迟 TTFT P99 下降 40.6%；
  • Hardware costs for switches and optical modules reduced by one-third. 交换机与光模块硬件成本减少三分之一。

item.title: Cohere 开源 Command A+，218B MoE 模型面向企业 Agent
item.guid: Cohere-开源-Command-A+，218B-MoE-模型面向企业-Agent
item.description:
Cohere officially announced the open-sourcing of Command A+, a 218 billion-parameter MoE model that activates approximately 25 billion parameters per inference, licensed under Apache 2.0. Cohere 官方宣布开源 Command A+，这是一个 2180 亿参数的 MoE 模型，每次推理激活约 250 亿参数，采用 Apache 2.0 许可。

The official blog states that Command A+ is designed for enterprise-grade agents, complex reasoning, multimodal document processing, and data sovereignty scenarios. Cohere emphasizes that this model can be deployed on 1 B200 or 2 H100 GPUs, and improves text and multimodal input inference speeds through optimizations for the MoE architecture. 官方博客称，Command A+ 面向企业级 agent、复杂推理、多模态文档处理和数据主权场景。Cohere 强调，这款模型可以在 1 块 B200 或 2 块 H100 上部署，并通过针对 MoE 架构的优化提升文本和多模态输入推理速度。

item.title: 抖音电商展开潮玩盲盒专项治理
item.guid: 抖音电商展开潮玩盲盒专项治理
item.description:
Douyin E-commerce announced yesterday that recent inspections found that some merchants and influencers, when selling and promoting trendy blind boxes, engaged in violations such as opaque drawing probabilities, promoting products in uncertain ways, inducing user consumption through gambling psychology, and guiding consumers to third-party websites for point redemption. 抖音电商昨日发文称，平台近期巡查发现，个别商家和达人在售卖、推广潮玩盲盒时存在抽取概率不透明、以不确定性方式推广商品、通过博弈心理诱导用户消费，以及引导消费者跳转第三方网站进行积分兑换等违规行为。

The platform stated that these behaviors harm consumer rights and disrupt the normal business order of merchants. Douyin E-commerce will further intensify its governance efforts and take measures such as product bans, business suspensions, deduction of security deposits, and store closures against violating merchants and influencers. 平台称，这类行为损害消费者权益，也干扰商家正常经营秩序。抖音电商将进一步加大治理力度，对违规商家和达人采取商品封禁、停业整顿、扣除保证金、店铺清退等处置。

The typical violations listed include four categories: lottery-style marketing where low-priced blind boxes are exchanged for high-value goods; guiding winners to off-platform channels such as third-party links or WeChat groups; accumulating blind box rewards as points and inducing continued participation; and selling products with opaque probabilities in forms such as "group buying cars," "black boxes," or "self-made blind boxes." 此次列出的典型违规包括四类：以低价盲盒兑换高价值商品的博彩式营销；中奖后引导至第三方链接、微信群等平台外渠道；把盲盒奖励沉淀为积分并诱导继续参与；以及以「团车」「暗箱」「自制盲盒」等形式销售概率不透明的商品。

Douyin E-commerce requires merchants and creators to self-inspect whether blind box products are clearly priced, whether drawing rules are clearly publicized, whether probability information is true and transparent, and prohibits guiding consumers to trade on third-party platforms or setting up gambling-like point or ranking mechanisms. 抖音电商要求商家和创作者自查盲盒商品是否明码标价、抽取规则是否清晰公示、概率信息是否真实透明，并不得引导消费者到第三方平台交易或设置博彩性质的积分、排名机制。

item.title: 一季度全球电视品牌出货量同比增长 3.3%
item.guid: 一季度全球电视品牌出货量同比增长-3.3%
item.description:
TrendForce's latest research report shows that global TV brand shipments reached 47.12 million units in the first quarter of 2026, a year-on-year increase of 3.3%, and a quarter-on-quarter decrease of 12.7%. TrendForce 集邦咨询最新研报显示，2026 年第一季度全球电视品牌出货量达到 4712 万台，同比增长 3.3%，较上一季度下滑 12.7%。

The first quarter is typically a slow season for TV sales, and coupled with reduced trade-in subsidies, overall demand remains conservative. TrendForce believes that the year-on-year growth in shipments this quarter primarily stems from cost pressures: demand for AI servers and high-end computing has driven up the tight supply of DRAM and NAND Flash, leading to a significant increase in TV memory prices by the end of 2025. Brand manufacturers are stocking up and pulling in orders early to mitigate subsequent cost pressures. 第一季度通常是电视销售淡季，叠加以旧换新补贴缩减，整体需求偏保守。TrendForce 认为，本季出货同比增长主要来自成本压力：AI 服务器和高端运算需求推高 DRAM 与 NAND Flash 供应紧张，电视用存储器价格在 2025 年底明显上涨，品牌厂商提前备货和拉货，以降低后续成本压力。

In terms of brand ranking, Samsung's shipments remained number one globally in the first quarter, followed closely by TCL, with Hisense, LGE, and Xiaomi ranking third to fifth. TCL benefited from its layout in North America and emerging markets, as well as the promotion of Mini LED and large-sized products, achieving shipments of 7.68 million units in the first quarter, a year-on-year increase of 11.3%, the highest growth among the top five brands. 品牌排名方面，三星第一季度出货量稳居全球第一，TCL 紧随其后，海信、LGE、小米分列第三至第五名。TCL 受益于北美和新兴市场布局，以及 Mini LED、大尺寸产品推广，第一季度出货量达 768 万台，同比增长 11.3%，为前五大品牌中增幅最高。

TrendForce expects that against the backdrop of continued increases in memory and material costs, global TV shipments will slightly decline by 1% year-on-year to 194.2 million units in 2026; first-tier brands will continue to lean towards Mini LED, large-sized, and high-end products, while other brands will increasingly shift towards medium-to-large sized models with FHD resolution. TrendForce 预计，在存储器和材料成本继续增加的背景下，2026 年全球电视出货量将小幅同比下降 1%，至 1.942 亿台；一线品牌会继续向 Mini LED、大尺寸和高端产品倾斜，其他品牌则更多转向 FHD 分辨率的中大尺寸机型。

item.title: 啄木鸟维修因「156 元修马桶最终付 1780 元」再引争议
item.guid: 啄木鸟维修因「156-元修马桶最终付-1780-元」再引争议
item.description:
According to a report by Sina Finance's "BUG" column, home repair platform Woodpecker (Zhuomuniao) has once again sparked controversy due to an incident where "toilet repair was quoted at 156 yuan, but ultimately cost 1780 yuan". 据新浪财经《BUG》栏目报道，家庭维修平台啄木鸟因「修马桶报价 156 元、最终付 1780 元」事件再度引发争议。

The report stated that Ms. Zhang from Nanchang had initially verbally agreed with the repairman on a 156 yuan repair fee, but after the visit, she was told that additional charges were needed for replacing parts like the motor, eventually paying 1780 yuan for a new Jomoo brand toilet; her family later found that the same model toilet cost about 550 yuan on Taobao. 报道称，南昌张女士原本与维修人员口头约定 156 元维修费，但上门后被以电机等部件更换需加价为由，最终支付 1780 元换购九牧品牌新马桶；其家人随后发现同款马桶淘宝价格约 550 元。

After the incident escalated, Woodpecker's official customer service responded, stating that the relevant technician had violated operating procedures and the platform would expedite handling. However, when the "BUG" column called Woodpecker's 400 customer service, the representative stated that the platform's standard procedure is for technicians to scan a code upon arrival, inspect, and then charge according to the price list, claiming ignorance of Ms. Zhang's incident. 事件发酵后，啄木鸟官方客服回应称，相关师傅存在违规操作，平台会加紧处理。但《BUG》栏目拨打啄木鸟 400 客服时，客服表示平台正规流程是师傅扫码上门，检测后按价格表收费，对张女士事件称不知情。

Woodpecker was exposed at the 2025 CCTV 3·15 Gala for "unnecessary repairs, over-repairing minor issues, and arbitrary charging." Data from the Black Cat Complaint platform shows that Woodpecker Home Repair has accumulated 10,147 complaints, with 226 complaints in the past 30 days; compared to approximately 6,000 complaints when it was exposed on 3·15 in 2025, there has been an increase of about 69% in one year. 啄木鸟曾在 2025 年央视 3 · 15 晚会上因「无病乱修、小病大修、乱收费」被曝光。黑猫投诉平台数据显示，啄木鸟家庭维修累计投诉已达 10147 条，近 30 天投诉量为 226 条；相比 2025 年 3·15 曝光时约 6000 条投诉，一年增长约 69%。

item.title: 《好莱坞往事》续集定档 11 月 25 日
item.guid: 《好莱坞往事》续集定档-11-月-25-日
item.description:
According to blogger "Watching Hollywood," Quentin Tarantino's sequel to "Once Upon a Time in Hollywood," titled "The Further Adventures of Cliff Booth," is set to premiere on Netflix on November 25 this year. The new film stars Brad Pitt, is directed by David Fincher, and written by Quentin. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，昆汀 · 塔伦蒂诺作品《好莱坞往事》续集《克里夫 · 布斯继续冒险》定档今年 11 月 25 日上线 Netflix。新片由布拉德 · 皮特主演、大卫·芬奇执导、昆汀编剧。

This film revolves around Cliff Booth from "Once Upon a Time in Hollywood," serving as an extended project for the original character. Brad Pitt previously won an Oscar for Best Supporting Actor for this role. 这部片围绕《好莱坞往事》中的 Cliff Booth 展开，属于原片人物的延展项目。布拉德 · 皮特此前凭借该角色获得奥斯卡最佳男配角。

item.title: 苹果娱乐业务 VP Eddy Cue 获戛纳国际创意节年度娱乐人物奖
item.guid: 苹果娱乐业务-VP-Eddy-Cue-获戛纳国际创意节年度娱乐人物奖
item.description:
The Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity recently announced that Eddy Cue, Apple's Senior Vice President of Services and Health, will receive the 2026 "Entertainment Person of the Year" award and will accept it at the Cannes Lions in June. 戛纳国际创意节日前宣布，苹果服务与健康业务高级副总裁 Eddy Cue 将获得 2026 年「年度娱乐人物」奖项，并将在 6 月的戛纳国际创意节领奖。

The organizers stated that Cue has long driven Apple's business in entertainment, media, and content creativity. Apple has also previously won awards at the Cannes Lions, including "Creative Marketer of the Year" in 2025. 主办方称，Cue 长期推动苹果在娱乐、媒体和内容创意领域的业务。苹果此前也曾在戛纳国际创意节获奖，包括 2025 年「Creative Marketer of the Year」。

Cue is currently responsible for services such as Apple TV and Apple Music. Cue 目前负责 Apple TV、Apple Music 等服务业务。

item.title: 火山引擎上线 AIGC 短剧创作平台火山剧创 1.0
item.guid: 火山引擎上线-AIGC-短剧创作平台火山剧创-1.0
item.description:
Volcano Engine announced yesterday that its one-stop AIGC short drama creation platform, Volcano Drama Creator 1.0, has officially launched. The platform targets the creative workflow of the short drama industry, adapting to models like Seedance and Seedream, and Volcano Engine claims it can shorten the production cycle by over 80%. 火山引擎昨日宣布，一站式 AIGC 短剧创作平台火山剧创 1.0 正式上线。平台面向短剧行业创作流程，适配 Seedance、Seedream 等模型，火山引擎称其可让制作周期缩短 80% 以上。

Volcano Drama Creator breaks down short drama production into nodes such as script understanding, storyboard analysis, material generation, and strategic review, and opens up core node editing permissions to users. This update adds prompt word editing, an IP asset library, and team collaboration features: the former is used to adjust visual details and styles, the IP asset library covers real and virtual human images, and the team function supports multi-role collaboration and point allocation. 火山剧创把短剧制作拆成剧本理解、分镜解析、素材生成、策略审片等节点，并向用户开放核心节点编辑权限。平台这次新增提示词编辑、IP 资产库和团队协作功能：前者用于调整画面细节和风格，IP 资产库覆盖真人与虚拟人像，团队功能则支持多角色协作和积分分配。
